ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: sugar, wheat flour , vegetable oils (palm oil, palm kernel oil, shea), lactose , pulp of hazelnuts 6 %, cocoa defatted powder 3,5 %, milk protein , stabilizer (sorbitol syrup), starch, fructose, skimmed milk powder, colouring agent (ammonia caramel), dietary fibre, salt, emulsifier (soy lecithin ), antioxidant (palmitate ascorbyle, extracts rich in tocopherols), flavorings,
